title: Set up MDX in Next.js for blog and content sites
summary: Configure next-mdx-remote with gray-matter, add frontmatter parsing, set up syntax highlighting, and build a blog with dynamic routes in Next.js App Router.
declaration: I will set up MDX in Next.js using next-mdx-remote and gray-matter. This lets you write blog posts and docs in MDX (Markdown + React components). If you need a GUI-based CMS editor, consider Payload CMS or Sanity instead.
